summary: @Granite0x: He built OpenClaw, then joined OpenAI to bring agents to everyone. instead of keeping his private Claude Code loadout to
whyItMatters: He built OpenClaw, then joined OpenAI to bring agents to everyone. instead of keeping his private Claude Code loadout to himself, he open-sourced it. Peter Steinberger. Founded PSPDFKit - the PDF SDK inside Dropbox and Evernote. 'agent-scripts' - his personal loadout of hard rules, skills, and guardrails he symlinks into ~/.claude/skills/ on every project.…
